jsonLd.title: Grofers is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a E-commerce Executive in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
